session_purpose: F28 Cycle 0: EventBus foundation multi-model audit
task_subtype: EventBus integration in cryodaq engine (alarm+experiment+event_logger wiring)
notes: Clean, focused 1 finding. v1 AlarmEngine not wired (REAL, LOW). No hallucinations. Best signal-to-noise.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 0: EventBus foundation multi-model audit
task_subtype: EventBus integration in cryodaq engine (alarm+experiment+event_logger wiring)
notes: Best quality response. Zero hallucinations. Uniquely identified event_logged ordering issue and experiment_stop naming. CRITICAL overcalled (ambiguous). Confirms pilot T3 3/3 rating.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 0: EventBus foundation multi-model audit
task_subtype: EventBus integration in cryodaq engine (alarm+experiment+event_logger wiring)
notes: Over-flag pattern confirmed (pilot T3 1.5/3). 2 hallucinations (asyncio cancellation confusion × 2). 6 LOWs are scope creep. CRITICAL + HIGH both hallucinated. Useful as counter-signal: if Qwen alone calls CRITICAL, reduce weight.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 0: EventBus foundation multi-model audit
task_subtype: EventBus integration in cryodaq engine (alarm+experiment+event_logger wiring)
notes: Null content — reasoning tokens only, no response output. Consistent with pilot 67% capacity failure pattern. No data contribution.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 0: EventBus foundation multi-model audit
task_subtype: EventBus integration in cryodaq engine (alarm+experiment+event_logger wiring)
notes: Mid-tier as expected. Wrong line references (10x off). 2 hallucinations (cancel safety + UTC import). Confirmed drop/counter finding (convergent with GLM). CRITICAL overcalled (wrapped by existing try/except).

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 0: EventBus foundation multi-model audit
task_subtype: EventBus integration in cryodaq engine (alarm+experiment+event_logger wiring)
notes: 429 MODEL_CAPACITY_EXHAUSTED after 2 retries. No contribution. Gemini quota failure again (consistent with pilot T1 capacity failure).

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 1: Ollama client + audit log + context builder dual-verifier audit
task_subtype: New agents/ module: OllamaClient, AuditLogger, ContextBuilder + smoke test
notes: P1 (CI): smoke test not excluded from default pytest run. REAL. Fixed immediately: addopts = '-m not smoke' in pyproject.toml + skip guard. After fix: PASS. Clean focused finding, no hallucinations.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 1: Ollama client + audit log + context builder dual-verifier audit
task_subtype: New agents/ module: OllamaClient, AuditLogger, ContextBuilder + smoke test
notes: Null content (finish_reason=length). Used all 4096 tokens on reasoning_content, no actual response generated. Second null-content result from GLM with large prompts (15KB). Pattern: GLM may require max_tokens >4096 for reasoning models on complex diffs, or prompt needs trimming. Useful calibration data point.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 2: GemmaAgent service + Slice A alarm flow multi-model audit
task_subtype: GemmaAgent (Гемма): EventBus subscriber, alarm_fired handler, Russian prompts, engine wiring
notes: 3 P2 findings all REAL: (1) trigger.enabled flag ignored, (2) empty truncated dispatch, (3) untracked handler tasks. All fixed in 2fbee22. Safety assessment: no engine-state-modification path found ✓. Clean precise review.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 2: GemmaAgent service + Slice A alarm flow multi-model audit
task_subtype: GemmaAgent (Гемма): EventBus subscriber, alarm_fired handler, Russian prompts, engine wiring
notes: 8192 max_tokens worked — full response produced. REAL: exc_info missing (fixed), private _send_to_all coupling (noted), alarm_min_level validation (fixed). HALLUCINATION: alarm handler blocks EventBus (wrong — EventBus uses put_nowait, no blocking). AMBIGUOUS: event_type=action contract change (intentional pre-fix), log-then-publish revert (conflicts with architect's explicit swap instruction — surfaced). Best finding: exc_info=True and alarm_min_level validation.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 2: GemmaAgent service + Slice A alarm flow multi-model audit
task_subtype: GemmaAgent (Гемма): EventBus subscriber, alarm_fired handler, Russian prompts, engine wiring
notes: 4 hallucinations confirmed: deque not time-aware (it IS time-aware), max_tokens unused (it IS passed), missing unavailable test (test exists), stop() no unsubscribe (unsubscribe IS called). High hallucination rate this session — worse than pilot data. Wrong line references (engine line 16664 vs actual ~1661). Effective signal-to-noise poor.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 2: GemmaAgent service + Slice A alarm flow multi-model audit
task_subtype: GemmaAgent (Гемма): EventBus subscriber, alarm_fired handler, Russian prompts, engine wiring
notes: 429 MODEL_CAPACITY_EXHAUSTED for third consecutive session. Pattern: Gemini 2.5 Pro consistently unavailable in this time slot. Recommend trying flash model or different time. No data.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 3: three new Slice A handlers + GUI insight panel — Codex self-review
task_subtype: GemmaAgent: experiment_finalize/sensor_anomaly/shift_handover handlers + gemma_insight_panel.py
notes: CRITICAL: _rebuild_cards() called deleteLater() on self._placeholder (persistent widget) then re-added same instance — 'Internal C++ object already deleted' risk. Fixed: skip deleteLater() for placeholder, toggle setVisible() instead. LOW: duration_str variable name misleading (held float before _format_age call). Fixed: renamed to age_float. All other concerns (handler isolation, sensor publish indentation, command placement) confirmed correct. 1 amend → PASS. SHA before: 875d08a, after: b99cd0a. Real finding rate: 100%.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 3 smoke test — all 4 Slice A scenarios with real gemma4:e4b
task_subtype: Real Ollama inference: alarm_fired, experiment_finalize, sensor_anomaly_critical, shift_handover_request
notes: 4/4 scenarios PASS. Latencies: alarm_fired=36.2s, experiment_finalize=30.2s, sensor_anomaly_critical=24.3s, shift_handover_request=92.6s. Total wall: 3.1min. Russian ratio: 91-94%. MEDIUM-1: stub label leak in Scenarios 2+4 — model echoes '[wired in Cycle 4]' stub text into response. Not a crash but visible. Fix: wire real data in Cycle 4. MEDIUM-2: shift_handover 92.6s approaching 120s timeout — longest response (933 chars, 796 tokens). Best quality: sensor_anomaly_critical (cites MAD sigma, correct diagnostic, safety instruction respected). Demo-ready: alarm_fired + sensor_anomaly_critical for external presentation; all 4 after Cycle 4 stub fix.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 4: Slice B diagnostic suggestions — Codex self-review
task_subtype: GemmaAgent Slice B: two-message flow (summary + diagnostic), DiagnosticSuggestionContext, SQLite reads
notes: HIGH-1: rate limit counts events (1 timestamp), but Slice B makes 2 LLM calls per alarm → effectively 120 calls/hr vs 60/hr advertised. Fixed: _generate_diagnostic_suggestion records its own timestamp. HIGH-2: diagnostic gate 'result.text.strip()' fires even on truncated result with partial text. Fixed: added 'not result.truncated' to gate. Both fixes confirmed by new tests (test_diagnostic_skipped_on_truncated_summary, test_diagnostic_counts_toward_rate_limit). SHA before: 32ea716, after: amend (same SHA). Real finding rate: 100%.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 4 smoke — Slice B two-message flow verification
task_subtype: Real Ollama inference: alarm_fired + sensor_anomaly_critical, verify 2 messages each
notes: 2/2 scenarios PASS. alarm_fired: summary 586ch/91%+diagnostic 807ch/98%, total 69.1s, Telegram×2 Log×2. sensor_anomaly_critical: summary 577ch/99%+diagnostic 731ch/99%, total 64.8s, Telegram×2 Log×2. MEDIUM: SQLite channel history returns 'нет данных' (no real data in smoke environment — expected). Model handles gracefully: 'отсутствие исторической информации' acknowledged. Diagnostic correctly references specific payload values (T1=8.5, MAD=0.08K) — no hallucination. GLM-5.1 audit: PENDING (tool not available this session).

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 5: Slice C campaign report intro — Codex self-review
task_subtype: report_intro.py: sync Ollama caller + DOCX integration via ReportGenerator
notes: HIGH-1: gemma.enabled=False not respected (only c_campaign_report checked). Fixed: combined both flags. HIGH-2: test made real network connection to port 19999 (slow/flaky in CI). Fixed: mock urlopen with URLError. MEDIUM: timeout 120s can fire before gemma4:e4b finishes 200-400 word generation. Fixed: minimum 180s enforced in load_intro_config(). IntroConfig default enabled=False (safe — requires explicit opt-in). GLM-5.1 audit: PENDING.

session_purpose: F28 Cycle 5 smoke — Slice C campaign report intro with real Ollama
task_subtype: report_intro.py: full synthetic experiment → Гемма annotation → DOCX
notes: 5/5 checks PASS. 197 words, 99.3% Russian, formal scientific register. Correctly cites κ=385 Вт/(м·К) from operator log, T1=4.2K, alarm acknowledged. DOCX: Heading Аннотация inserted after title page, marker present, GOST formatting. MEDIUM: 118.7s latency out of 180s budget — approaches limit when full SQLite context added in future. Demo material archived at data/agents/gemma/smoke-c5/smoke-c5-report-intro.docx. Award presentation-ready.

findings.description: CAMPAIGN_REPORT_INTRO_SYSTEM passed to Ollama without format_with_brand() interpolation — {brand_name} placeholder would appear literally in system prompt
findings.action: FIXED — added format_with_brand() call + brand_name field to IntroConfig

notes: All other 6 invariants verified REAL/PASS. One genuine miss in synchronous report_intro path.

session_purpose: F29 Cycle 1: periodic narrative reports audit
task_subtype: Assistant periodic_report_request trigger, engine timer, prompt/context/router path
notes: MEDIUM: PERIODIC_REPORT_SYSTEM hardcoded last-hour wording despite configurable window_minutes; fixed with prompt change + regression. LOW: calibration entries were generic other-events despite spec category; fixed with calibration_entries + prompt section + regression. Smoke e2b PASS: 19.2s wall, 94.8% Russian, telegram/log/gui/audit, idle skip.

session_purpose: F29 Cycle 1: periodic narrative reports audit
task_subtype: Assistant periodic_report_request trigger, engine timer, prompt/context/router path
notes: CCR GLM dispatch attempted twice. First invocation failed with missing prompt input; second invocation ran ~6 minutes with no output and was terminated. Recorded as tool/dispatch failure, not model quality verdict.
